hero.tagline: Managing Business Through Knowledge, Processes and Technology
hero.description: Fluxor Consulting is an expert in transforming distributed companies through comprehensive consulting and digitalisation: from strategy to implementation. We combine deep industry expertise with project and process management practice, helping businesses in IT, finance, manufacturing and logistics achieve sustainable growth and operational efficiency.

about.heading: About Fluxor
about.headingSubtitle: Transforming business with cutting-edge technology and deep expertise.
about.title: Commitment to excellence
about.subtitle: What sets us apart is our integrated approach:
about.imageOverlayText: We work with clients worldwide, breaking boundaries for your business
points: Strategy, processes, and technology — within a single solutions ecosystem
Deep expertise in transforming distributed structures
Real cases in automation, digitalisation, and AI implementation
Development and deployment of methodologies that work in the field
Building process offices and training teams for your context
about.closing: We don't just advise — we transform.
